**QUALITY REQUIREMENTS FOR CONTENT IN THE CLOUD ADOPTION FRAMEWORK**

1. **Address decision makers.** Decision makers are responsible for technology adoption, governance, security, and operational standards. Don't address architects or developers designing individual workloads. That guidance belongs in the Azure Architecture Center and/or Well-Architected Framework
   
2. **Provide high-quality guidance.** Your expertise should allow you to provide (recommendations), best practices, and decision guidance. The goal is to help decision makers navigate the options tradeoffs better and faster.

3. **Check the structure and voice.** Internal employees, use [**CAFinate**](https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/?titleId=T_823b84f1-27a7-03da-b436-25c35ae8c4b1) for help geting the correct structure. External contributors, review aka.ms/cafdata for examples.

4. **Submit a proposal.** All contributions are vetted and reviewed. Some are approved. Many are not. Use the [Contribution](https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=v4j5cvGGr0GRqy180BHbRxxUz-ZV53lLrgTaBjGRmtBUMkhJWUFPREJYUlFHNDVONUsxQ0VZOTFRTS4u) form to submit a proposal.
